reference: HOW INDIFFERENT YOU LOOK BUT I TELL YOU HER DEEP BLUE EYES FLASHED AS SHE SPOKE THAT SO LONG AS YOU WERE STILL A GENUINE CREATING ARTIST THE CASE WAS DIFFERENT
text: How indifferent you look, but I tell you— Her deep blue eyes flashed as she spoke. That so long as you were still a genuine creating artist, the case was different.
